title: camellia iniquicarpa
intro: Camellia iniquicarpa is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the tea plant, which produces the leaves used for making tea. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Camellia iniquicarpa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, as well as being used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. Camellia iniquicarpa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies and supplements.
